PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IN LIGHT OF THE FOREGOING , IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANTS 22 BATTERY STREET, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION AND HYPERBARIC MEDICAL SERVICES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, AND EACH OF THEM, TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF THEIR CROSS COMPLAINT AGAINST CROSS-DEFANDANT MARK MURILLO, THAT THE SAME BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND THAT CROSS-DEFENDANT MARK MURILL RECOVER HIS COSTS OF SUIT.
